description_long: This serving tray consists of a wooden board with a natural, slightly irregular shape and a visible wood grain texture. The tray features a rounded cutout handle on one side for easy carrying. On its surface, there are several food items: a stack of round, pale crackers, a wedge of soft white cheese, a small pile of walnuts, and a few fresh raspberries. The wood appears unfinished or lightly finished, giving it a rustic, organic look. The tray is relatively flat with a thin profile and no raised rim, making it suitable for serving snacks or appetizers in casual or urban outdoor settings.
description: A rustic wooden serving tray with a cutout handle, topped with crackers, cheese, walnuts, and raspberries. The tray has a natural wood grain and a flat, thin profile.
description_view_0: The tray is seen from above at an angle, clearly showing the crackers, cheese, walnuts, and raspberries arranged on the wooden surface.
description_view_1: This view highlights the cutout handle and the arrangement of food items, with the cheese and walnuts more prominent.
description_view_2: The crackers are most visible in this view, fanned out across the tray, with the handle and wood grain also in focus.
description_view_3: The walnuts and raspberries are more central, and the irregular edge of the tray is visible, emphasizing its organic shape.
attribute_handles: One oval cutout handle integrated into the wood near one edge; no attached grips.
attribute_rim_design: Minimal rim; the edge is flat, thin, and follows the natural contour of the wood with no raised lip or decorative features.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surface appears matte with low reflectivity, showing no significant glare or highlights. The handle and edges have the same finish as the main surface.
